positive: A minimal, geometric representation of a stylized forest at twilight. Focus on clean, strong silhouettes of various deciduous and coniferous trees forming an interlocking pattern. The background should be a gradient wash of deep indigo and muted teal. Incorporate simple, abstract shapes like crescents and stars integrated into the negative space of the branches. Style: Mid-century modern illustration meets Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print. High contrast, highly graphic, perfect for screen printing on t-shirts. Composition: Symmetrical and centered, ensuring visibility and pop on apparel. Colors: limited palette of deep blues, forest green, and cream white, with selective neon highlights for depth.
negative: photo, realistic, detailed anatomy, logos, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, blur, out of focus, cropped, extra limbs, low resolution, noisy, poor composition
